description: LAYOUT: Vertical two-section layout. Top section (~65%) features a close-up lifestyle photo of a nose with visible pores, with bold text overlaid on the upper-left. Bottom section (~35%) is a solid pale mint-green banner with centered text. PRODUCT: No packaged product shown; the 'product' is the skin concern itself shown via close-up photography. A small curved arrow points from the text toward the nose. HEADLINE: Top-left overlay text reads 'Those aren't blackheads' in a large, bold, dark green/black handwritten-style or heavy serif font with 'blackheads' in a lighter mint-green cursive/script style. Text is left-aligned, stacked in 3 lines. SUBTEXT: Bottom banner reads 'How to clear up sebaceous filaments' in dark charcoal/black, medium-weight sans-serif font, centered. CTA: No explicit button CTA. COLORS: Pale mint green (#C8E6C9 range) for bottom banner and script text, dark charcoal/near-black for bold headline text, soft peachy skin tones in the photo. SPACING: Generous padding in the bottom text banner (~20px). Text in top section has about 15-20px margin from edges. MOOD: Educational, curiosity-driven, skincare-focused, slightly clinical but approachable.

LAYOUT: Single full-bleed square image with a heavy frosted/blurred overlay covering the entire frame. Product image is barely visible behind the blur. Content is vertically centered with icon, headline, and body text stacked. PRODUCT: A supplement pouch/packet is faintly visible behind the blur effect, appearing purple/blue toned, intentionally obscured to create curiosity. HEADLINE: 'Warning this will cure brain fog' in bold white sans-serif font, centered, medium-large size (~20px equivalent). An eye-with-slash icon (white, line-style) sits centered above the headline. SUBTEXT: Below headline in smaller white sans-serif regular weight: 'Don't click this if you suffer from brain fog... this will unlock hours of focus and productivity' - centered, about 3 lines. CTA: No explicit button; the entire ad acts as a curiosity-click trigger. COLORS: Deep purple-blue gradient background (#4A148C to #1A237E range) with heavy gaussian blur/frost overlay creating a muted purple-gray atmosphere. All text is pure white. SPACING: Icon has ~30px margin below top, ~15px gap to headline, ~10px gap to body text. Side margins ~25px. MOOD: Mysterious, curiosity-gap, psychological trigger, premium supplement feel.

LAYOUT: Two-column comparison layout (VS format) on a clean white background. Left column shows competitor product, right column shows the advertised product. A dark green circle with 'VS' in white sits centered between the two columns. Below each product are 4 benefit/drawback bullet points. PRODUCT: Left side: a brown kraft paper coffee bag with scattered coffee beans at its base, photographed at slight angle. Right side: a light green tea box (Firebelly Green Tea) with a clear glass cup of amber tea beside it. Both products are roughly 40% of the frame height, centered in their columns. HEADLINE: Left column header: '2 PM COFFEE' in bold dark serif/sans-serif uppercase. Right column header: 'FIREBELLY GREEN TEA' in bold dark green uppercase. Both are top-aligned above their respective products. SUBTEXT: Left bullet points (no icons, plain text): 'Makes you crash', 'Decreases sleep quality', 'Can upset your stomach', 'Gives you jitters & anxiety'. Right bullet points (each with a green checkmark circle icon): 'No crash', 'Provides calm & focus', 'High in antioxidants', 'Sustained energy without the jitters'. COLORS: White background (#FFFFFF), dark forest green (#2E7D32) for right-side text and VS circle and checkmarks, dark gray/black for left-side text, kraft brown tones in coffee bag, light sage green (#C8E6C9) on tea box. SPACING: Equal column widths (~48% each), ~4% gap. ~20px top margin, ~15px between product images and bullet lists. MOOD: Clean, educational, direct comparison, health-conscious, persuasive.

LAYOUT: Small square format. Top portion is a lifestyle photo showing a hand filling a white water bottle from a kitchen tap/faucet. Bottom portion has a white/light background with Q&A text overlay. The text area takes up roughly 40% of the frame. PRODUCT: A white/cream reusable filtered water bottle, shown being filled under a modern kitchen faucet. Bottle is roughly 30% of frame width, positioned center-right. HEADLINE: Question at top of text area: 'Do the bottles remove contaminants from my tap water?' in small dark text. SUBTEXT: Answer text: 'Yes! Our filtered bottles can be filled up from any tap water source and remove up to 99.9% of 200+ contaminants.' in slightly smaller dark text. CTA: No explicit CTA button. COLORS: Neutral tones - stainless steel faucet, white bottle, warm kitchen background, white text overlay area, dark gray/black text. SPACING: Compact layout with ~10px margins. Text is left-aligned with small padding. MOOD: Informative, FAQ-style, trust-building, clean, practical.

LAYOUT: Square format with a dreamy, soft-focus nature background (misty green mountains/hills). Left side has headline text and benefit checklist stacked vertically. Right side shows the product held by a hand emerging from the bottom. Roughly 55% text area (left), 45% product area (right). HEADLINE: 'The focus you've been searching for' in large dark serif or bold sans-serif font, left-aligned, ~3 lines. SUBTEXT: Four benefit lines each preceded by a green checkmark: 'Boost focus', 'Enhance motivation', 'Sustain energy', 'Improve mood' in medium dark sans-serif font. CTA: Black rectangular button with rounded corners at bottom-left containing 'GET 20% OFF TOAY' in white uppercase bold text. PRODUCT: A small glass bottle (like a shot-sized supplement bottle) with a white label reading 'magic mind', held between thumb and forefinger. The bottle has a green liquid inside, positioned center-right, roughly 35% of frame height. COLORS: Soft sage green/misty background (#E8F5E9 to #C8E6C9 range), dark charcoal text, bright green checkmarks, solid black CTA button, white CTA text. SPACING: ~20px left margin for text, ~15px between headline and checklist, ~10px between checklist items, ~15px between checklist and CTA. MOOD: Natural, calm, focused, wellness-oriented, aspirational.

LAYOUT: Square format split into two zones. Left ~50% shows a model wearing the featured product (lilac sweatshirt). Right ~50% shows a flat-lay stack of the same product in three color variants, each labeled. Light lavender/lilac background. PRODUCT: Cozy crewneck sweatshirts shown in three colors stacked on the right: 'Lilac' (top, lavender purple), 'Mint' (middle, sage green), 'Cream' (bottom, off-white/cream). Each has a small rounded-rectangle label tag. The model on the left wears the lilac version with matching sweatpants. HEADLINE: No primary headline text. SUBTEXT: Color name labels ('Lilac', 'Mint', 'Cream') in small dark text on light gray/sage rounded pill-shaped badges positioned next to each folded item. CTA: No explicit CTA button. Small logo icon in bottom-right corner. COLORS: Lavender/lilac background (#E1BEE7 to #CE93D8 range), matching lilac on main product, sage green (#A5D6A7), cream/off-white (#FFF8E1), gray label backgrounds. SPACING: Tight composition, products touching edges. ~5px padding around labels. MOOD: Soft, feminine, cozy, lifestyle-aspirational, color-showcase.

LAYOUT: Square format with light cyan/turquoise gradient background. Centered vertical stack: headline at top, product in center, three category questions with 'Yes!' answers across the bottom. PRODUCT: A white cylindrical supplement jar with turquoise/mint lid and label, branded 'ZITSTICKA BLUR POTION'. A single brown/amber supplement capsule floats to the right of the jar. Product is centered, roughly 40% of frame height. HEADLINE: 'A dark spot fader that actually works for...' in large bold dark/black text at top. 'actually works' is in italic or script style for emphasis. SUBTEXT: Three columns across the bottom, each with a question and answer: 'Melasma?' / 'Yes!', 'Post-Pimple?' / 'Yes!', 'Sun Damage?' / 'Yes!'. Questions in dark serif/sans-serif, 'Yes!' in a rounded peach/salmon pink badge/pill shape. CTA: No explicit CTA button; the 'Yes!' badges serve as visual affirmations. COLORS: Light cyan/turquoise gradient background (#E0F7FA to #B2EBF2), white product jar, turquoise/mint accent on jar (#4DB6AC), peach/salmon pink badges (#FFAB91), dark near-black text. SPACING: ~25px top margin, ~20px between headline and product, ~20px between product and bottom row. Bottom items evenly spaced across width. MOOD: Clean, medical-beauty, problem-solution, reassuring, bright and clinical.

LAYOUT: Square format with a warm beige/cream background. Top-left has brand logo and handle. Center-top has bold headline. Center features a product lifestyle photo inset (like a card/image within the ad) showing the product being used. PRODUCT: A coral/salmon-pink branded pouch (RYZE Mushroom Chicory) with a hand spooning powder into a latte cup, shown in a styled photo card. The card has pink brushstroke decorative elements. HEADLINE: 'SAY NO TO BLOATING' in large bold black uppercase sans-serif font, centered above the photo card. SUBTEXT: Brand identifier at top: 'RYZE SUPERFOODS' with handle '@ryzesuperfoods' in smaller text, preceded by a red/coral brand icon. CTA: No explicit CTA button. COLORS: Warm beige/cream background (#FFF8E1), coral/salmon pink (#E57373) on brand logo and product pouch, pink brushstroke accents, black text, warm brown tones in the latte photo. SPACING: ~15px top margin for logo, ~10px gap to headline, ~15px gap to photo card. Photo card has ~15px internal padding and rounded corners. MOOD: Warm, inviting, health-wellness, Instagram-native, lifestyle.

LAYOUT: Full-bleed square image with a blurred/defocused lifestyle photo of a woman wearing black leggings as the background. Text is overlaid on the lower 60% of the image, left-aligned. The product (leggings) is shown being worn rather than as a packaged item. PRODUCT: Black athletic leggings shown on a model, heavily blurred/out-of-focus as the background. The product IS the background. HEADLINE: Two-part headline. First part in regular weight white italic text: 'It took us one whole year to make pants which'. 'one whole year' has a subtle color highlight (slightly different white/cream). Second part in extra-bold white uppercase: 'YOU'LL FALL IN LOVE WITH IN LESS THAN 10 SECONDS'. Text has a subtle rainbow/holographic shimmer effect on the bold portion. SUBTEXT: 'Tap to reveal' in small light gray/white regular text at the bottom-left. CTA: No button; 'Tap to reveal' serves as the engagement prompt. COLORS: Gray-toned blurred background (muted charcoal), white text throughout, subtle holographic/rainbow shimmer on bold text. SPACING: ~25px left margin, ~20px bottom margin. ~10px gap between the two headline sections. MOOD: Teasing, curiosity-driven, premium, fashion-forward, mysterious.

LAYOUT: Square format split into two horizontal zones. Top ~40% has a white background with centered black text (headline + subheadline). Bottom ~60% has a dark charcoal/near-black background featuring multiple device mockups. A search bar element sits at the very bottom. PRODUCT: Multiple device mockups (laptop, desktop monitor, smartphone, tablet) all displaying the same landscape/nature scene (green hills, blue sky, clouds). Devices are arranged in an overlapping composition with the monitor largest in the center-back. HEADLINE: 'More results and fun in your marketing' in large bold black italic serif font, centered on white background. SUBTEXT: 'FOLLOW THE FREE ONLINE MARKETING CHALLENGE' in smaller uppercase spaced-out sans-serif below the headline. CTA: A browser-style search bar at the very bottom with magnifying glass icon, 'www.AdsFlow.com' text, X button, and microphone icon - styled to look like a Chrome address bar. COLORS: White top section (#FFFFFF), dark charcoal/near-black bottom section (#212121), green landscape on screens, black text. SPACING: ~20px top margin, ~15px between headline and subtext, ~20px between subtext and device mockups. MOOD: Professional, digital-marketing, educational, tech-forward, clean.

LAYOUT: Small square format. Left ~55% shows a lifestyle photo of a muscular man in a t-shirt holding a coffee mug. Right ~45% has a dark/black background panel with 'As Seen On' text and brand logos stacked vertically. PRODUCT: No specific product shown; this is a brand credibility/social proof ad. The man represents the target customer. HEADLINE: 'As Seen On' in white italic script/serif font at the top of the dark panel. SUBTEXT: Brand logos stacked vertically: Slack (with icon), Spotify (with icon), Google (text), Airbnb (with icon), plus 'Employees' text at the bottom in white. Each logo is in its recognizable brand style but rendered in white. CTA: No CTA button. COLORS: Dark charcoal/black right panel (#1A1A1A), warm-toned lifestyle photo on left, white text and logo marks. SPACING: Logos are evenly spaced vertically with ~12px gaps. ~15px padding in the dark panel. MOOD: Credible, professional, aspirational, trust-building, corporate-adjacent.

LAYOUT: Small square format. Left ~55% shows stacked product boxes (silk pillowcases) in various pastel colors at an angle. Right ~45% shows an iPhone Messages screenshot overlay with a text conversation. Brand name at bottom center. PRODUCT: Multiple Blissy silk pillowcase boxes in pastel colors (pink, blue, white, dusty rose) stacked/fanned at angles, showing the 'blissy' branding on each. HEADLINE: No traditional headline; the text message conversation serves as the hook. SUBTEXT: iPhone Messages UI showing a conversation snippet: 'I regret not getting a silk pillowcase years ago', 'It's been an absolute game-changer for me and I think you'll love it', 'The material just feels so luxurious and I've never had a bad hair day since I got it.' Brand name 'blissy' in lowercase at bottom. CTA: No CTA button. COLORS: Pastel pinks and blues on product boxes, white/gray iPhone Messages UI, light blue message bubbles, brand text in dark gray. SPACING: Products fill left half edge-to-edge, Messages UI overlaps slightly into center. MOOD: Social proof, conversational, feminine, luxury-accessible, testimonial-driven.

LAYOUT: Small horizontal/landscape format with a dark charcoal/near-black background. Five food bowls arranged in a slight arc across the center. Bold white German-language headline text above. Price callout below. Brand logo at bottom-right. PRODUCT: Five different prepared meal bowls (pasta, rice dishes, etc.) shown from above at a slight angle, evenly spaced across the frame. Each bowl shows a different colorful meal. HEADLINE: 'Schnelles Mittagessen geht auch in gesund!' in bold white sans-serif font, centered above the bowls. SUBTEXT: '21 Mahlzeiten ab 3,21 EUR pro Mahlzeit' with the price '3,21 EUR' highlighted in a yellow/green accent badge or background. CTA: No explicit button. COLORS: Dark charcoal/near-black background (#1A1A1A), white text, yellow/green price highlight, colorful food in bowls. Brand logo 'Huel' in white bottom-right. SPACING: ~15px top margin, ~10px gap between text and bowls, bowls evenly distributed with ~8px gaps. MOOD: Practical, health-conscious, value-proposition, European market, clean-dark aesthetic.

LAYOUT: Square format with a warm beige/cream background (#F5E6D0 range). Top section has a banner-style headline. Center shows two product pouches side by side. Bottom section has a stats row with 4 metrics, and below that a row of 5 certification/attribute icons. PRODUCT: Two protein powder pouches side by side - left is blue/navy ('vanilla' flavor with 'hi!' branding) and right is deep red/maroon ('chocolate' flavor with 'hi!' branding). Both pouches are roughly 35% of frame height. HEADLINE: 'The #1 BLOAT-FREE PROTEIN' in bold dark text at top, with '#1' and 'BLOAT-FREE' in extra-bold/larger weight. Text sits in a subtle rounded banner shape. SUBTEXT: Four stat columns below the products: '22g Organic protein', '5g Healthy fiber', '0g Added sugar', '! Great taste guaranteed' - each with the number in large bold and descriptor in smaller text. Below that, 5 small icons with labels: 'Gluten free', 'Keto + Paleo', 'Dairy free', 'Organic protein', 'No added sugar'. CTA: No explicit CTA button. COLORS: Warm beige/cream background, navy blue (#1A237E) left pouch, deep maroon/red (#B71C1C) right pouch, dark text, subtle warm tones throughout. SPACING: ~20px top margin, ~15px between headline and products, ~15px between products and stats row, ~10px between stats and icons. MOOD: Clean, health-focused, trust-building, premium-natural, stats-driven.

LAYOUT: Square format styled as a Twitter/X post screenshot on a bright yellow background. The tweet card is white with standard Twitter UI elements (avatar, name, handle, timestamp, engagement icons). Below the tweet text are three book cover thumbnails in a row. PRODUCT: Three book covers shown in a horizontal row within the tweet: 'Atomic Habits' by James Clear, 'Deep Work' by Cal Newport, 'Thinking, Fast and Slow' by Daniel Kahneman. These serve as social proof for the Shortform app being advertised. HEADLINE: The tweet text IS the headline: 'Try this to learn 10x faster:' followed by numbered steps. SUBTEXT: Tweet from '@Mya123' (Mya Willis) with steps: '1. Stop scrolling', '2. Download Shortform's free trial', '3. Use it for 30 mins a day', '4. Implement your knowledge in your job, life, and relationships'. Timestamp: '02:44 PM - FEB 18, 2023'. CTA: No explicit button; the tweet format implies clicking through. COLORS: Bright yellow background (#FFD600), white tweet card, dark text, standard Twitter blue for links, book covers in muted tones. SPACING: ~25px yellow border on all sides around the tweet card. Standard Twitter post internal spacing. MOOD: Educational, self-improvement, social proof via fake tweet, aspirational, productivity-focused.

LAYOUT: Square format with a bold yellow background (#FDD835 range). Product jar is centered with cream/product smeared artistically around and behind it. Headline at top, benefit callouts positioned around the product at the corners/sides. Brand name at bottom-left. PRODUCT: A yellow-lidded jar of 'Gleamin Vitamin C Clay Mask' centered in the frame, roughly 35% of frame height. Thick yellow cream product is smeared in expressive strokes behind and around the jar. HEADLINE: 'Hyperpigmentation Mask' in large bold dark/black sans-serif at the top, with 'Apply for 10 Minutes' in slightly smaller text below. SUBTEXT: Three benefit callouts positioned around the product with dashed lines pointing to the jar: 'Reduces Dark Spots' (top-right), 'Evens Skin Tone' (left), 'Improves Texture' (bottom-right). Each in dark bold text. Brand name 'gleamin.' in dark bold lowercase at bottom-left. CTA: No explicit CTA button. COLORS: Bright yellow background (#FDD835), matching yellow product/cream, dark charcoal/black text, yellow jar lid. SPACING: ~15px margins all around. Callout text positioned at roughly 3 o'clock, 9 o'clock, and 5 o'clock positions relative to the product. MOOD: Bold, vibrant, skincare-solution, clean-beauty, eye-catching.

LAYOUT: Square format with a bold saturated yellow background (#FDD835). Product jar is centered with thick cream product smeared in bold diagonal brush strokes behind and around it. Headline text at top spanning full width with two lines. Benefit callouts positioned at three points around the product with small dashed-line connectors. Brand name at bottom-left corner. PRODUCT: A Gleamin Vitamin C Clay Mask jar (yellow lid, yellow label with green 'g' logo) centered in the frame, roughly 30% of frame height. The jar sits amid generous swirls of thick yellow clay mask product smeared across the background. HEADLINE: 'Hyperpigmentation Mask' in large bold dark/black sans-serif at the top line, with 'Apply for 10 Minutes' in slightly smaller medium-weight text on the second line. Both lines centered. SUBTEXT: Three benefit callouts with dashed connector lines pointing toward the jar: 'Reduces Dark Spots' (upper-right, ~2 o'clock position), 'Evens Skin Tone' (left, ~9 o'clock position), 'Improves Texture' (lower-right, ~4 o'clock position). Each callout in bold dark sans-serif. Brand name 'gleamin.' in bold dark lowercase at bottom-left. CTA: No explicit CTA button. COLORS: Saturated yellow background (#FDD835), matching yellow product cream, dark charcoal/near-black text (#212121), yellow jar with green brand accent. SPACING: ~15px margins all around. ~10px gap between headline lines. Callouts ~20px from jar edge with fine dashed lines. MOOD: Bold, vibrant, skincare-solution, ingredient-focused, eye-catching, clean-beauty.

LAYOUT: Square format with a soft lavender/light purple background. Social proof stat at top, bold headline below, centered product held up by a hand from the bottom. A pink accent banner at bottom-right. PRODUCT: A beige/nude product box ('skin sidekick pillowcase') held up by a woman's hand with pink nail polish, entering from the bottom-center. The box shows a pillowcase product. Product is roughly 40% of frame height. HEADLINE: 'The #1 Anti-Acne Pillow Case' in large bold dark/black sans-serif. '#1' is extra prominent. SUBTEXT: '2000+ Sold Globally' in smaller text above the headline. A pink rounded banner at bottom-right reads 'Sleep comfortably while ridding to 99.7% of bacteria' in white text. CTA: No explicit CTA button. A small curved arrow doodle points from the stats area toward the product. COLORS: Soft lavender/light purple background (#E1BEE7), beige/nude product box, hot pink nail polish, pink accent banner (#F48FB1), dark text, white text on pink banner. SPACING: ~20px top margin, ~10px between stats and headline, product centered with ~15px side clearance. MOOD: Feminine, health-beauty, social-proof driven, clean, youthful.

LAYOUT: Square format with a white/off-white background. Left ~40% has headline text and a checklist of 5 benefits. Right ~60% shows a collage of 3 product photos (model wearing leggings in different poses). PRODUCT: Black athletic leggings shown in 3 views: full-body side view (left photo), full-body front/action view (top-right), close-up of pocket detail (bottom-right). The collage shows the product from multiple angles. HEADLINE: 'The Perfect Leggings Do Exist' in bold dark sans-serif, left-aligned. SUBTEXT: Five benefits with checkbox icons: 'Warmth without Bulk', 'Smooth Stretchy Fit', 'Plush, Soft Feel', 'Odor Destroying', '2 Side Pockets'. Each in medium dark sans-serif. CTA: No explicit CTA button. Small brand icon at bottom-right. COLORS: White/off-white background, black leggings, dark charcoal text, subtle gray checkbox icons, neutral/beige tones in model photos. SPACING: ~15px left margin for text, ~10px between headline and checklist, ~8px between checklist items. Photo collage fills right side edge-to-edge. MOOD: Clean, athletic, functional, benefit-focused, minimalist.

LAYOUT: Small landscape/horizontal format. Full-bleed lifestyle photo of a woman on rocky terrain outdoors. Text overlay on the lower portion, left-aligned. Brand logo at top-left. PRODUCT: Shoes (slip-ons) implied but not prominently featured - the focus is on the lifestyle/adventure setting. HEADLINE: 'Breeze Through Unexpected Adventures' in bold white sans-serif, left-aligned on the lower-left. SUBTEXT: 'NEW BOARDWALK SLIP-ONS' in smaller uppercase white text above the headline. Brand logo 'vessi' in white at top-left. CTA: No explicit CTA button. COLORS: Warm earth tones in the outdoor photo (brown rocks, green vegetation), white text throughout, brand logo in white. SPACING: ~10px left/bottom margins for text. Logo ~10px from top-left corner. MOOD: Adventurous, outdoorsy, aspirational, lifestyle-focused, active.

LAYOUT: Small square format with a dark/moody background. Left half shows a close-up lifestyle photo of a person's torso (black v-neck shirt, gold jewelry). Right half has text overlaid - headline at top and stats stacked vertically. PRODUCT: Gold jewelry (necklaces, bracelet, ring) shown being worn on a model. No packaged product. HEADLINE: 'JEWELLERY THAT WON'T BREAK THE BANK' in bold white uppercase sans-serif, right-aligned. SUBTEXT: Three bold stats stacked: '10X MORE AFFORDABLE THAN SOLID GOLD', '4X THICKER PLATING VS COMPETITORS', '1X LIFETIME GUARANTEE'. Numbers (10X, 4X, 1X) are extra-large bold, descriptors in smaller text. CTA: No CTA button. COLORS: Dark/black background, warm gold tones on jewelry, white text throughout. SPACING: ~10px right margin, stats stacked with ~8px gaps. MOOD: Premium, affordable luxury, bold claims, masculine-leaning, dark and sophisticated.

LAYOUT: Vertical format. Top ~55% shows the product (box and bottle side by side) on a clean light gray background. Bottom ~45% shows a Facebook-style comment/review overlay with user name, text, and reaction icons. PRODUCT: A white product box and matching white/lavender bottle side by side. Both labeled 'VIDA GLOW Gut Pro' with 'WOMEN'S HEALTH' subtitle and 'DEBLOAT. RESTORE. VAGINAL HEALTH.' tagline. Products are centered, roughly 50% of frame height. HEADLINE: No traditional headline; the product name and the comment serve as the messaging. SUBTEXT: Facebook comment from 'Madison N.' reading 'Hands down the best I've felt in years' with Like/Reply options and reaction emojis (thumbs up, heart, laugh) with count '75'. CTA: No CTA button. COLORS: Light gray background (#F5F5F5), white/lavender product packaging, peach/salmon oval accent on box, dark text, Facebook UI blue and standard reaction colors. SPACING: ~15px top margin for products, ~10px between products and comment overlay. Comment has standard Facebook spacing. MOOD: Trust-building, testimonial-driven, clean, women's health, clinical-premium.

LAYOUT: Small square format with a sage/olive green muted background. Left ~45% has text content (label, headline, description). Right ~55% shows a model in athletic wear. PRODUCT: Light sage/olive green athletic leggings with pockets, shown on a model in a casual athletic pose. HEADLINE: 'Daily Pocket Legging' in bold dark sans-serif, left-aligned. SUBTEXT: 'New Colors' label at top in small uppercase. Below headline: 'The Daily Pocket Legging combines soft comfort & bright with side pockets for your lifestyle on the go.' in smaller regular text. CTA: No CTA button. COLORS: Sage/olive green background (#8D9A7B range), matching sage leggings on model, dark text, white top on model. SPACING: ~10px margins, compact text stacking. MOOD: Natural, athletic-casual, earthy, minimalist, lifestyle.

LAYOUT: Small square format with a hot pink background. Three product containers arranged across the center. Star rating at top, customer review quotes on the sides, guarantee banner at bottom. PRODUCT: Three pink-labeled 'COLLAGEN BURN' supplement containers (from a brand called something like 'Obvi'), arranged with the center one slightly forward. The containers are cylindrical with pink gradient labels. HEADLINE: Star rating (5 stars) with '500+ 5 STAR REVIEWS' at the top in white text. SUBTEXT: Customer testimonial quotes from 'SHANNON K.', 'MELANIE M.', and 'LISA P.' positioned around the products in small white text. CTA: Bottom banner: '30 DAY MONEY BACK GUARANTEE' and 'FREE SHIPPING USA' in small white text on a darker pink bar. COLORS: Hot pink gradient background (#E91E63 to #F06292), pink product labels, white text throughout, gold/yellow stars. SPACING: Tight/compact layout with ~8px margins, testimonials squeezed into corners. MOOD: Feminine, energetic, social-proof heavy, bold, supplement-marketing.

LAYOUT: Square format with a coral/salmon pink background with tropical leaf illustrations. Center features a mock tweet/social post card overlaid on the background. A hand extends from the bottom reaching upward. PRODUCT: No physical product shown; this advertises BetterHelp therapy service. The 'product' is represented by the tweet card. HEADLINE: The tweet card contains: 'BetterHelp @BetterHelp.com' header, then 'Starting therapy can be scary, but we're here to help' as the main message. 'Just now' timestamp. SUBTEXT: No additional subtext beyond the tweet content. CTA: No explicit CTA button. COLORS: Coral/salmon pink background (#FF8A80), sage green tropical leaf illustrations (#81C784), white tweet card, dark text on card, BetterHelp green brand icon. SPACING: ~30px margins around the tweet card. Hand reaches up from bottom-center. Leaf illustrations in upper-left and lower areas. MOOD: Warm, supportive, approachable, mental-health-positive, tropical-calming.

LAYOUT: Square/slightly tall format with a very light gray/off-white background. Large headline centered at top. Product bottle centered vertically in the middle. Five benefit callouts positioned around the bottle connected by dashed lines. PRODUCT: A tall glass bottle with a silver cap containing green liquid (Athletic Greens/AG1 supplement drink). The bottle has a large 'AG' monogram. Product is centered, roughly 55% of frame height. HEADLINE: 'Better Health Starts Within.' in large bold dark serif font, centered at top. SUBTEXT: Five benefit callouts positioned around the bottle: 'Boosted Immune System' (upper-left), 'Better Cardiovascular Health' (right), 'Improved Gut Health' (center-left), 'Stress Recovery' (lower-right), 'Shaper Cognitive Function' (bottom-left). Each connected to the bottle by horizontal dashed lines. Key words in bold. CTA: No CTA button. COLORS: Off-white/very light gray background (#FAFAFA), dark teal/green text (#00695C), green liquid in bottle, silver cap. SPACING: ~30px top margin, benefits evenly distributed vertically around the bottle with ~15px gaps. Dashed lines create visual connections. MOOD: Premium, health-wellness, clean, scientific, aspirational.

LAYOUT: Square format with a soft pink background (#FCE4EC range). Large bold headline on the left (~55%), product held by a hand on the right (~45%). Ingredient list in a boxed section lower-left. Price callout in top-right area. 'As Featured In' press logo at bottom-right.
